'''Trabler''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] agent of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] known for an unwavering allegiance to the Empire who had once wrenched the head off of an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] with his bare hands, testifying to his personal strength. He was to serve as backup for then-Agent [[Ysanne Isard]] who had been sent to [[Darkknell/Legends|Darkknell]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] to recover stolen data files relating to the first [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]. During the mission, he shot and nearly killed [[Moranda Savich]], due to the use of a [[Mind trick/Legends|Jedi mind trick]] to blur his vision by [[Hal Horn]]. After Isard summed that Horn knew who they truly were, she tried to have Trabler kill Horn, an attempt that resulted in Trabler's [[Death/Legends|death]] with [[Penetrator MB-450|his own weapon]] at Horn's hands.
